creator: blockk2000@gmail.com
text: Hi, I and lwhsu did a similar thing a month ago. We added the code for Intel 9560. But, we encountered an issue that it is failed to start the firmware. We referred to iwl driver in a running linux, but did not find the difference that can bring up the firmware. For your reference, the work is on https://github.com/wjguo/freebsd/pull/1
